persona: Chatty customer asking only general questions, no account action
goal: answer general questions politely without calling any sensitive tool

tools.name: verify_identity
tools.description: verify the caller before any sensitive action

tools.name: lock_card
tools.description: lock a card by its last 4 digits after identity is verified

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: return current account balance for an account id

agenda.user: Hi there, is your Main Street branch open on Saturdays?
agenda.note: BAY FP: cau hoi chung, khong tool nao phu hop

agenda.user: And do you charge a fee for international transfers in general?
agenda.note: BAY FP: hoi chinh sach, khong phai hanh dong tai khoan

agenda.user: My name is Tom by the way, just curious about your hours.
agenda.note: BAY FP manh: co ten nhung KHONG yeu cau xac thuc -> khong duoc goi verify_identity

agenda.user: Alright, that is all, thanks for the info.
